title: KKTN-017 Business trip! Acme exercise bike is good (at home)! Mana-chan, 20 years old, Mana Hirate - Mana Flat
description: In order to solve the lack of exercise of the AV actress, SOD will deliver a special exercise bike with an electric massager attached to the saddle to the actress's house! The girl this time is Mana-chan, who is so beautiful that she seems to be in an idol group. It seems that the house has just moved, but the staff is full of immorality as to whether it is okay to look into such a daughter's house. What's more, even changing clothes will show you a comfortable face in uniform. The beautiful face is distorted by the pleasure of electric massager, which is a national treasure-class permanent preservation version! !! As for the staff, the face that is enduring that it seems to be lively is irresistible.
